articles.title: Uncle Sam is wrong, India and China are doing their bit to fight climate change
articles.summary: It is true that there is an increase in carbon emission by India and China due to homegrown consumption and lack of infrastructure. But let s keep in mind that India s carbon emissions per capita are still 10 times lower and China s is half of that compared to the US.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Taking Stock: Market fails to hold on to day s gains, ends marginally higher
articles.summary: Grasim Industries, Bharti Airtel, Nestle India, Maruti Suzuki and HCL Technologies were the biggest Nifty gainers, while losers included Sun Pharma, BPCL, Reliance Industries, MM and Hindalco Industries
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Sensex, Nifty gain for third day in a row; easing volatility to support bull trend
articles.summary: Analysts expect the market to maintain the bullish undertone as elections and corporate earnings season continue
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Mid-day Mood | Cooling volatility sparks market rally, India VIX sees steepest fall in 4 years
articles.summary: Broader markets outperformed benchmarks, with the BSE Midcap and BSE Smallcap rising up to 0.9 percent

articles.title: Sensex, Nifty extend gains to 3rd day, Q4 results to guide stock-specific action
articles.summary: India VIX, which measures near-term volatility saw a sharp fall of 18 percent to trade around 10.42
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Agri Picks Report: Geojit
articles.summary: According to Geojit, Madhya Pradesh is preparing to spend 11.6 bln rupees under the price support scheme to procure kharif pulses--tur, urad, and moong--harvested in 2020-21 (Jul-Jun), a state government official said.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Crude already reflects market s view that rebalancing is still some time away
articles.summary: With hopes of another round of stimulus measures flying out of the window, the US needs more economic activity to get demand flowing.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Rise in textile demand to support MCX cotton ahead of harvest season in October
articles.summary: Traders are also concerned about the flood-like situation that can damage the crop, which is harvested from October to February, in various parts of India.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Agri Picks Report: Geojit
articles.summary: According to Geojit, Rubber prices rose nearly 10% over the past three-four weeks and hit a record high of 140 rupees a kg due to pent-up demand after easing of the pandemic induced lockdowns amid a supply crunch.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Oil prices slip as growing stockpiles signal bumpy fuel demand recovery
articles.summary: U.S. West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude futures fell 20 cents, or 0.5%, to $37.85 a barrel at 0056 GMT, after climbing 3.5% on Wednesday.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: US EIA cuts 2020 world oil demand growth forecast
articles.summary: In its monthly forecast, the agency cut its oil demand growth estimate for 2021 by 490,000 bpd to 6.53 million bpd.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Gold may remain choppy, but buying may emerge at lower levels: Kotak Securities
articles.summary: Gold may remain choppy but buying may emerge at lower levels amid increasing global uncertainty and also as Fedâs dovish stance may limit upside in US dollar.

articles.title: Oil breaks below $40/bbl on demand concerns, improving supply
articles.summary: Fed s dovish stance may also limit any major upside in the US dollar.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Agri Picks Report: Geojit
articles.summary: According to Geojit, Global consumption of edible oils is expected to fall 30-40% in 2020 because of coronavirus lockdowns, said Dominic Xavier, Middle East and North Africa region head at Sime Darby Oils.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Gold flat as dollar strength counters safe-haven demand
articles.summary: Spot gold was little changed at $1,929.30 per ounce by 0038 GMT, after falling to a near two-week week low of $1,906.24 on Tuesday.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Oil falls further amid growing alarm over coronavirus second wave
articles.summary: The biggest global health crisis in a century continues to flare unabated with cases rising in India, Great Britain, Spain and several parts of the United States, where the infection rate has not come under control for months.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Gold may witness choppy trade, expect buying at lower levels: Kotak Securities
articles.summary: After weeks of consolidation, crude oil has come under pressure amid signs of correction in US equity market and gains in US dollar index.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Energy Weekly Report: Motilal Oswal
articles.summary: According to Motilal Oswal, Oil prices hit a rough patch last week, falling back in line with broader financial markets. Prices did try to inch higher, but experienced selling pressure at highs.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Precious Metals Weekly Report: Motilal Oswal
articles.summary: According to Motilal Oswal, Gold fell to the lowest level in a month primarily as the dollar rose against its major crosses and better-than-expected economic number from the US.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Base Metals Weekly Report: Motilal Oswal
articles.summary: According to Motilal Oswal, Base metals traded choppy last week, with prices hitting multi month highs at the start of the week and followed by some profit taking on back of volatility in the dollar and mixed data signals from China and US.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Rolex Rings sets July 3 as record date for ₹180-crore share buyback
articles.summary: Rolex Rings will conduct a share buyback of up to 10 million equity shares at ₹180 each, with July 3, 2026, as the record date. The buyback follows a board approval and aims to stabilize stock prices amid recent declines.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Stock market today: Sensex, Nifty 50 extend losses for 2nd consecutive session; mid, small-caps outperform
articles.summary: Stock market today: The Sensex ended 250 points, or 0.33%, lower at 76,478.67, while the Nifty 50 dropped 81 points, or 0.34%, to settle at 23,865.75.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Penny stock under ₹10 hits 5% upper circuit. Details here
articles.summary: A-1 Limited's shares reached ₹7.30, capped at a 5% limit, after becoming the primary dealer for Ishan Dyes' sulphur chemicals. This partnership enhances A-1's market presence and is expected to drive revenue growth in FY2026-27 and beyond.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Gold vs Silver: Which commodity offers better return potential in H2 CY26?
articles.summary: During the first half of CY26, Comex gold prices have fallen more than 7%, while silver has corrected over 16%. In the domestic market, while MCX gold price has gained roughly 4% on a in 2026 so far, MCX silver price has declined more than 5% during the same period.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Upcoming IPO: Fibe parent Social Worth Technologies files DRHP with SEBI for IPO
articles.summary: Parent company of Fibe, Social Worth Technologies Ltd, filed for an IPO aiming to raise up to ₹750 crore. Proceeds will support its subsidiary EarlySalary Services and corporate needs. Founded in 2015, it has diversified lending and improved profitability significantly since 2021.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Waaree Energies: US Customs’ ruling may be a temporary blip amid robust domestic outlook
articles.summary: Waaree Energies shares fell 4% following a US Customs ruling on tariff evasion for imports from Vietnam and Malaysia. Facing a potential 2.7 times tariff increase, Waaree's reputation may be at risk.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Waterways Leisure Tourism IPO listing tomorrow. Here’s what GMP signals about share debut on Dalal Street
articles.summary: According to websites tracking grey market activity, the GMP today stands at - ₹47 per share, pointing toward discounted debut on Wednesday.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Is HDFC Bank’s leadership reset the missing piece of the puzzle?
articles.summary: HDFC Bank's aggressive leadership changes aim to erase a steep governance discount that has caused the share price to plunge 20% this year despite improving financials.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Zerodha's Nithin Kamath reveals the simple investing formula most people ignore
articles.summary: Nithin Kamath of Zerodha argues that effective investing is about adhering to basic principles like disciplined asset allocation rather than seeking high returns. He introduces lifecycle funds in India as a means to simplify long-term investing with automated asset management and rebalancing.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Expert view: Nifty 50 may give negative returns in 2026, earnings may improve from Q3FY27, says Rahul Ghose of Hedged
articles.summary: Expert view: Rahul Ghose, CEO of Octanom Tech, warns that Nifty 50 could see marginally negative returns in 2026. He anticipates an earnings recovery from Q3FY27 if oil prices remain low and monsoon conditions normalise, setting the stage for future market gains.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Atharva Polyplast IPO Day 1: Issue subscribed 67% so far. Check GMP, key details
articles.summary: The Atharva Polyplast IPO started on June 30, offering shares at ₹55-60. As a manufacturer of precision plastic components for various industries, the IPO shows a 67% subscription on day one, suggesting a robust demand and an estimated listing price of ₹66 in the grey market.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Small-cap stock under ₹50: Blue Cloud Softech Solutions hits 5% upper circuit despite weak trend on Dalal Street
articles.summary: Blue Cloud Softech Solutions share price has risen 10% in three months, but is down 9% in six months. The smallcap stock has fallen 38% in one year, and has declined 81% in two years.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Sampark India Logistics IPO Day 1: SME IPO opens today - check GMP, subscription status, and other details
articles.summary: Sampark India Logistics' IPO opened on June 30, aiming to raise ₹27 crore with a price band of ₹80-84 per share. The issue closes on July 2, with expected allotment on July 3 and listing on BSE SME on July 7.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Kratikal Tech IPO day 1: GMP signals over 20% listing pop, subscription status, price band, other details of BSE SME IPO
articles.summary: Kratikal Tech IPO day 1: Kratikal Tech's IPO launched on June 30, aiming to raise ₹40 crore for business expansion. Amid growing interest, the grey market indicates a potential listing pop ofover 20%.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Seemax Resources IPO opens today. Here's GMP, subscription status, & other key details
articles.summary: The GMP of Seemax Resources IPO is currently +0 in the grey market, as per websites tracking the unlisted market.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Nifty 50 Trading Strategy: Analysts recommend Bull Call Spread options strategy for 7 July expiry
articles.summary: Nifty 50 Trading Strategy: Axis Securities has recommended a Bull Call Spread strategy for Nifty options contracts expiring on 7 July 2026, expecting a moderately bullish view.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: FMCG sector set for strong Q1, lower crude oil prices to boost margins, says Anand Rathi; Marico, HUL among top picks
articles.summary: The FMCG sector is expected to see healthy revenue growth in FY27, fueled by innovation and price adjustments. Anand Rathi highlights top picks like Marico and Hindustan Unilever, despite rural demand risks associated with weather conditions impacting the market.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: After May rout, banks see RBI's FCNR move as a tailwind
articles.summary: After being the most heavily sold sector by foreign investors in May, banking stocks have likely found a fresh tailwind. Analysts say the RBI's latest foreign currency deposit scheme could lower funding costs and improve the sector's long-term investment appeal.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: NSE SME stock hits record high despite muted trends in the Indian stock market. Do you own?
articles.summary: RFBL Flexi Pack Limited's shares rose 3% on June 30 after securing a ₹20 crore order for transparent and metallized films. The broader equity market remained subdued due to concerns over US interest rates, with Nifty and Sensex posting minor declines.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Bajaj Auto share buyback to open on July 1: Should you participate in the ₹5,633 crore offer?
articles.summary: Bajaj Auto share price surged as much as 1.06% to ₹9,732 apiece on NSE on Tuesday, ahead of buyback opening.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: SBI, HDFC Bank to ICICI Bank: Nuvama recommends these 12 banking stocks to buy today for long term
articles.summary: Nuvama Institutional Equities highlights 12 banking stocks, including SBI, HDFC Bank, and ICICI Bank, as top picks for long-term investment, emphasizing their potential upside amidst macroeconomic challenges.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Vinit Mobile IPO opens today; GMP, subscription status, price band, other key details of SME IPO
articles.summary: Vinit Mobile IPO price band is set at ₹150 to ₹158 per share, and the IPO lot size is 800 shares. The company aims to raise ₹34.13 crore from the book-building issue, which is entirely a fresh issue of 21.60 lakh equity shares.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Teja Engineering Industries IPO opens today. GMP, subscription status, other details of NSE SME IPO in 10 points
articles.summary: Teja Engineering Industries IPO: According to market observers, shares of the company are available at par in the grey market today
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Healthcare stock Park Medi World hits record high despite weak trends on Dalal Street
articles.summary: Healthcare stock Park Medi World surged as much as 4.45% to 303.70 apiece in Monday's trading session despite weak market sentiments on Dalal Street.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Multibagger renewable energy stock Suzlon Energy share price gains on 105 MW order win; do you own?
articles.summary: Following the launch of the S175 wind turbine, Sunsure Energy has placed a 105 MW order with Suzlon, showcasing strong market confidence. The collaboration supports growth in renewable energy and aims to meet India's industrial energy needs.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Nifty IT plunges over 2%; Infosys, LTIMindtree, TCS among top laggards
articles.summary: On June 30, the Nifty IT index dropped over 2% due to global tech weaknesses and demand concerns. Key players like LTIMindtree, Infosys, and TCS led the decline, with analysts highlighting a crucial support level that could define the index's trajectory.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Japanese yen slides to 40-year low against the US dollar
articles.summary: The Japanese currency is on track to decline 2% in the second quarter, marking its fourth consecutive quarterly loss. This is its longest losing streak since 2022, when it fell for seven straight quarters, according to Reuters.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Advit Jewels IPO GMP signals strong listing on July 1; check allotment status, subscription and other details
articles.summary: The Advit Jewels IPO received significant investor interest, being oversubscribed 212.63 times. The issue's price band is set at ₹130-138 per share. The company will debut on stock exchanges on July 1, with a grey market premium indicating a possible listing price of ₹184 per share.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Oyo IPO: Parent Prism files updated DRHP for ₹6,650 crore public issue
articles.summary: According to the Updated Draft Red Herring Prospectus (UDRHP) filed on Tuesday, the IPO will consist of a fresh issue of equity shares worth up to ₹6,650 crore, marking the company's latest bid to enter the public markets.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Knack Packaging IPO opens tomorrow. GMP, date, size to review in 10 points
articles.summary: Knack Packaging IPO GMP today: According to market observers, shares of the company are available at a premium of ₹5 in the grey market today
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Bitcoin price falls below $60,000 again: Experts reveal key levels to watch for the cryptocurrency - What lies ahead?
articles.summary: Bitcoin struggles near $58,000 as bearish sentiment prevails. The market looks towards US economic reports and expected interest rate hikes, causing subdued trading and cautious investor behavior across digital assets.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Aastha Spintex IPO Day 2: Issue booked 1.10x so far. Check GMP, subscription, review. Apply or skip?
articles.summary: The Aastha Spintex IPO is priced between ₹125-136 and opens for subscription until 1 July. It has allocated 20% for QIBs, 40% for NIIs, and 40% for retail investors, with allotments expected on 2 July and listing on 6 July.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Gold rate drops near ₹1,40,500 per 10 grams on MCX; silver declines below ₹2,21,000 per kg; what should investors do?
articles.summary: MCX gold August futures were 1.28% down at ₹1,40,574 per 10 grams, while MCX silver September contracts were 1.04% down at ₹2,20,322 per kg around 9:10 am.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Rupee opens marginally weaker at 94.57 against US dollar
articles.summary: The Indian rupee opened weaker at 94.57 against the US dollar, hindered by high demand for dollars despite a recovery from its record low. The rupee remains range-bound as global tensions and foreign investor caution affect the currency and market sentiment.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: SIS announces ₹120 crore share buyback, fifth since listing; check details
articles.summary: SIS Ltd has proposed a ₹120 crore share buyback, its fifth since 2017. The maximum buyback price is set at ₹478.50 per share. This follows an 8% stock rise in a month and highlights the company's commitment to returning around ₹720 crore to shareholders through various initiatives.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Morgan Stanley cuts oil price forecast again as Strait of Hormuz flows recover, warns of glut
articles.summary: Morgan Stanley has downgraded its oil forecasts as Strait of Hormuz traffic normalizes quicker than expected, coupled with strong US supplies and weak Chinese demand, risking an oil glut. Brent prices are expected to average $75 per barrel for the next two quarters.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: The human cost of India’s new welfare architecture, explained in charts
articles.summary: India is shifting from rights-based welfare to new welfarism, prioritizing centralized cash transfers and tangible goods over public services. This transition strains state finances and risks eroding long-term human development.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: The women behind India’s economy—and the price of invisible work
articles.summary: A recent Supreme Court judgment places economic value on the work done by homemakers. That value won’t make it into GDP math, but should find its way into policymaking.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Freight rates to stay elevated amid high demand for tankers, vessels
articles.summary: Global shipping freight rates are expected to stay high for the coming months due to increased demand from recovering trade flows and the peak shipping season, despite a slight easing in rates following the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Industrial output grows 5.1% in May under new IIP series with 2022-23 base
articles.summary: Growth was led by a robust expansion in manufacturing and supported by moderate growth in mining and electricity, according to provisional data released by the statistics ministry on Monday.
articles.label: BULLISH
